snippet.title: The Moment with Ryan Patel: Featuring AMD CEO Lisa Su | HP
snippet.description:
Welcome to season two of The Moment with Ryan Patel.

In this episode, Lisa Su, CEO of AMD, talks about AMD’s leading role in the future of AI, her team’s commitment to building great products, her favorite music and so much more.

We would love to hear what most inspired you about Lisa’s story. Let us know in the comments!

#HPTheMoment

Listen to the full conversation with Lisa and other guests on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/7EH1VIAoJFJlsGsGUwDTYQ

#leadership #disruption #ai #hpthemoment

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/2mGfXhF

SHOP NOW: https://www.hp.com/us-en/shop

About HP:
HP Inc. is a technology company that believes one thoughtful idea has the power to change the world. Its product and service portfolio of personal systems, printers, and 3D printing solutions helps bring these ideas to life. Visit http://www.hp.com.

snippet.title: Chambers Talks Episode 24: Tech for Good with Dr. Lisa Su, Chair and CEO of AM
snippet.description: In episode 24 of “Chambers Talks: A Podcast Series with John Chambers”, Dr. Lisa Su, Chair and CEO of AMD, joins John on the podcast to discuss what “tech for good” truly means in practice. With a solid internal innovation engine, a knack for executing strategic acquisitions, and a plan for engaging in more public-private partnerships, Dr. Su and her team are hyper-focused on finding opportunities to use emerging technologies, like AI, to tackle the world’s toughest challenges. Dr. Su highlights the importance of communication, describes how she really feels about feedback, and outlines exactly how organizations can do their part to address the issues of diversity and inclusion in all industries, including the tech industry. See full episodes of Chambers Talks at www.jc2ventures.com

snippet.title: Leadership in Challenging Times: A Discussion with Dr. Lisa Su, Chair and CEO, AMD
snippet.description:
“It used to be that technology and semiconductors were actually under the covers, so people didn't really think about what chips do. Now, I think it has become very, very clear that semiconductors are at the heart of just about every application that you can imagine…There are so many things that can be better with technology, and so much of our research and development could be better if we're using more advanced technology.”

This reflection comes from Dr. Lisa Su, Chair and CEO of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD). Su is a guest on CED’s Leadership in Challenging Times podcast/webcast series and—along with the AMD team—a recipient of CED’s 2023 Distinguished Leadership Awards.

 CED’s Leadership in Challenging Times series interviews outstanding business leaders who are the recipients of CED's Annual Distinguished Leadership Awards, about the unprecedented challenges facing our nation and how they have helped chart a path forward for their companies, communities, and the nation at large. In this conversation Su discusses using technology and AI as a force for good, turning the challenges of a crisis into opportunities for innovation, and more.

snippet.title: The Bring Up: Dr. Lisa Su and Cavin's DIY Flight Case PC Build
snippet.description:
We Bring Up: insights about AMD Ryzen™ AI, AMD Instinct™ MI300 accelerator and other exciting product announcements from the #AMD #CES2023 opening keynote. From medical treatment to recommending all the things you didn't know you wanted, our CEO Dr. Lisa Su gets to the core of why #AI is all the rage in tech right now. Plus, Cavin breaks down his new flight case PC build shenanigans. What would you name it? Cavin asked ChatGPT and the results were not too shabby.

Discover more: https://www.amd.com/en/events/ces

Chapters
01:13 Our Interview with Dr. Lisa Su
01:24 25 billion with a B transistors and Moore's Law is not dead
02:20 Ryzen™ AI and the role of AI in consumer products
03:50 What’s in store for 2023: Integrating AMD Xilinx IP across the AMD technology portfolio  
04:50 Big thing, very big thing: AMD Instinct™ MI300 accelerator with 3D stacked chiplets!
06:31 ChatGPT is just the beginning
07:03 The low-down on AMD Ryzen™ 7000 X3D
09:36 Cyberdeck PC build break-down by Cavin
12:40 ChatGPT tries to name the Cyberdeck

***

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/Subscribe_to_AMD

Follow us on Twitter: https://bit.ly/AMD_On_Twitter 
Follow us on Twitch: https://Twitch.tv/AMD

snippet.title: The best quotes from Lisa Su  #quotes #subscribe #amd
snippet.description:
Lisa Su, born in Taiwan in 1969, is a prominent electrical engineer and business executive. She holds a Ph.D. from MIT and has had a distinguished career in technology companies like Texas Instruments and IBM. In 2014, she became the CEO and President of Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), where she's led the company to notable advancements in semiconductor technology, challenging industry giants. Lisa Su is celebrated for her leadership, recognized in lists like Fortune's "Most Powerful Women," and serves as a role model for diversity and inclusion in the tech world.


#quotes #subscribe #amd
